The workaround with a new status/filter is nice, but not the solution.

items.excerpt:
Is there a way to have the option to change the font colors in status labels? 
It’s very hard to read the white font on light colors.

items.excerpt:

Quando o status de um quadro alocado em uma pasta, seja executado como ‘‘encerrado’’ o mesmo se mova automaticamente para a pasta de projetos encerrados.

items.title: Please create the ability to make Folders in the "files / attachments" section.
items.excerpt: In tracking a large project, often many many revisions of recaps, quotes, and drawings are imported. The ability to create new folders within the files area will greatly help with info organization and retrieval.

items.title: Change the font color of headers for the Pivot Boards widget when in Dark Mode
items.excerpt: Light grey font over a light blue-grey fill is quite hard to read. Please change it. Thanks.

items.title: Kann man eine Zeitleiste auch mit Stunden angeben?
items.excerpt:
Kann man eine Zeitleiste auch mit Stunden angeben, wenn eine Aufgabe z.B. 2.5 Tage geht. 
Dann sollte ersichtlich sein, dass die Maschine noch nicht den ganzen Tag verplant ist.

items.excerpt: I’ve had to split work between two boards because I can’t choose which groups to show in the kanban board. I now have to check and report on two separate boards.
